title: KEPLIN 20 Pack Premium Rubber Coated Metal Hangers - Heavy Duty - Space Saving Organiser Clothes Hangers For Wardrobes Coat Rack Rails (Black)
features: Upgrade your closet organization with the KEPLIN 20x Premium Rubber Coated Metal Hangers. These heavy-duty hangers are designed to save space and keep your wardrobe neatly organized.

Crafted from high-quality metal and coated with rubber, these hangers are built to last. The rubber surface ensures a secure grip, preventing your clothes from slipping or falling. Plus, the special grooves are perfect for hanging delicate items like tank tops and scarves, keeping them in place and wrinkle-free.

Say goodbye to flimsy hangers that bend and sag under the weight of your clothes. The KEPLIN Premium Rubber Coated Metal Hangers feature a sturdy hook that can support any garment without losing shape. Whether you're hanging coats, dresses, or trousers, these hangers provide reliable and flexible support

Maximize your closet space with these space-saving hangers. With a thickness of only 4 cm, they take up minimal room while increasing the available storage space in your wardrobe. No more rummaging through piles of clothes – these hangers keep your garments organized, easily accessible, and free from creases.

Versatile and practical, these hangers are not limited to dry clothes. They are also perfect for air-drying wet garments. Measuring 42 x 0.5 x 19.2 cm (W x D x H), they accommodate various clothing sizes and types. Invest in the KEPLIN 20x Premium Rubber Coated Metal Hangers and enjoy a clutter-free, visually appealing wardrobe.
